leaderRationale: Parse failed: ERROR: codex failed: spawn codex ENOENT

conceptual_groups.summary: Canonical artifact paths omit directory prefix — self-check MISSING_REQUIRED_OUTPUT findings unresolved

findings.description: <outputs> section lists canonical artifacts as '<slug>-role.md', '<slug>-role-contract.json', etc. using only bare slug-prefixed filenames. The canonical directory 'tools/agent-role-builder/role/' is never stated. Self-check correctly flags MISSING_REQUIRED_OUTPUT for all four canonical artifacts (role.md, role-contract.json, decision-log.md, board-summary.md). An agent following this role cannot determine where to promote frozen artifacts.

conceptual_groups.redesign_guidance: Prefix every canonical artifact entry in <outputs> with its full directory path, e.g. 'tools/agent-role-builder/role/<slug>-role.md'. The run-output directory (e.g. tools/agent-role-builder/runs/<run-id>/) should be distinguished from the canonical promotion target. This resolves all four self-check MISSING_REQUIRED_OUTPUT findings.

conceptual_groups.summary: Contract 'intent' field describes a one-time resumption run, not the tool's standing purpose

findings.description: contract.intent reads: 'Resume and finalize the agent-role-builder self-role using improved review process (structured feedback, split-verdict, arbitration).' This is an ephemeral operational note from a prior run, not a declaration of the tool's standing purpose. It will mislead any consumer (orchestrator, onboarding reviewer) that loads this contract to understand what the tool does.

conceptual_groups.redesign_guidance: Rewrite intent to express the standing purpose, e.g.: 'Create, update, and fix agent role packages through governed multi-LLM board review, producing frozen packages only when no material pushback remains.' Ephemeral run context belongs in the resume package or decision log, not the contract intent.

conceptual_groups.summary: Duplicate 'Application workflow creation' entry in <scope> Not in scope list

findings.description: 'Application workflow creation' appears twice under Not in scope. The second occurrence adds parenthetical clarification that is useful ('role definition markdown is a role specification, not a workflow') but the duplicate entry is noise and could cause parsing ambiguity.

conceptual_groups.redesign_guidance: Merge into a single entry: 'Application workflow creation (role definition markdown is a role specification, not a workflow).' Remove the bare first occurrence.

residual_risks: Even after adding canonical directory paths to <outputs>, implementors may derive paths from convention rather than explicit config — consider surfacing the canonical base directory as a named constant in the contract or in a dedicated <paths> block.

The self-check step (Step 3) verifies tag presence but the self-check tool itself did not catch the contract intent mismatch — the self-check scope may need to include contract-to-role semantic consistency, not only structural tag checks.
strengths: All 9 required XML tags present and correctly ordered.
Authority hierarchy is clean: owns/does-not-own distinction is precise and non-overlapping with llm-tool-builder.
Guardrails are specific and enforceable: freeze condition, reviewer pair composition, provenance requirements all stated.
Step outputs enumerated per step with artifact type labels — no ambiguity about what each step produces.
Completion criteria are terminal-state-complete: all four terminal states (frozen, pushback, blocked, resume_required) covered.
